reviews.comment:
Los baños eran un asco,un gabinete cerrado,los otros manchados con materia fecal y tapados...papeles en el piso y cestos repletos...hacía mucho que no pasaban a mirar ese baño...vergüenza¡¡¡

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were disgusting, one stall was closed, the others were stained with feces and clogged...paper on the floor and overflowing bins...it had been a long time since anyone had checked that bathroom...shameful!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHZ2NUX25BRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
